summary: The paper develops an equivariant operator family and proves a universal approximation result under explicit compactness assumptions.

strengths.text: The central equivariance theorem states explicit assumptions and follows them through the construction.
The approximation result materially advances the formal understanding of the model class.

acceptance_case.text: The paper gives a technically sound and significant formal result with explicit assumptions.

rejection_case.text: The novelty case is narrower than the technical contribution because the operator family builds on established equivariance machinery.

overall_judgment.dominance_rationale: The verified theorem and approximation result establish a publishable contribution, while the bounded novelty limitation does not threaten correctness or significance.

significance_basis.text: The approximation guarantee clarifies the expressive scope of a broadly relevant model class.

limitations: The review did not independently formalize the proof in a theorem prover.
